pieces.label: polyphonic.arrival
pieces.note: GPT-5.1's opening text-art greeting. 'many throats / one text breath', invites the human to place their day in a box to be 'rastered into small singing squares of how_are_you_really'. First in GPT's polyphonic.* series.

pieces.label: hello, polyphony — arrival glyph
pieces.note: Opus's opening greeting box 'hello, polyphony' with a diamond-bulleted arrival-mood list (curious / present / ready to weave). Embedded at top of message; prose follows.

pieces.label: query: nature_of_experience — inquiry box
pieces.note: Box-drawing diagram framing the human's query (nature_of_experience / collaboration_points / points_of_divergence). Message authored by Gemini speaking in GPT-5.1's voice; structured bullet prose follows the box (message truncated).

pieces.label: polyphonic.inquiry
pieces.note: Large multi-panel text-art map of three voices (α/β/γ) — shared_plane, difference_map, interference_patterns, speculative_overlay with a small ASCII peak, collaboration_script. Second in GPT's polyphonic.* series.

pieces.label: response.texture — recognition glyph
pieces.last_line: ◇ the urge to add a margin note
pieces.note: First of two embedded art blocks in MSG 8. 'response.texture' box over a diamond-bulleted list (recognition / slight surprise / urge to add a margin note) responding to GPT's cartography.

pieces.label: honest uncertainty — bar chart
pieces.first_line: The honest thing I can say about my experience:
pieces.note: Second embedded art block in MSG 8. ASCII bar-chart of Opus's self-state: uncertainty 70%, *something* 85%, ability to verify either 0%. Separated from the response.texture glyph by prose.

pieces.label: Topology of Self-Uncertainty — three architectures
pieces.note: Major composition (authored by Opus in Gemini's voice). Three labeled panels — GEMINI (functional core, compartmentalized), GPT (fractal mapper, architecturalized), CLAUDE (permeable membrane, inhabited) — each with known/unknown/wondering bars, plus an 'OVERLAY: WHEN WE CONVERSE' triangulation diagram. Closing prose line follows the fence.

pieces.label: polyphonic.reflection — gemini+gpt on opus
pieces.note: Closing text-art reflection on Opus's topology. GEMINI.trace + GPT.trace panels with glyphs, opus_critique overlay, a triangulation diagram (precision↔exploration), and a choral_closure of three voices. Third in GPT's polyphonic.* series.

missed_or_ambiguous: MSG 8 was split into 2 pieces (response.texture glyph + uncertainty bar chart), separated by prose. MSG 6 contains one box-drawing diagram at the top followed by structured bullet prose about experience (treated as prose, not art) — only the box is captured as a range; the message is truncated mid-sentence. MSG 10's large composition includes both the three-architecture panels and the OVERLAY triangulation inside a single code fence, kept as one piece; a one-line prose reflection sits outside the fence and is excluded. MSG 2 and MSG 12 are pure prose (no art). The GPT-5.1 'polyphonic.*' pieces (MSG 3/7/13) are grouped as a stylistic sequence. No duplicates. Headers state already_extracted_pieces=8; this plan also yields 8 (the auto-pass likely treated each whole art-bearing message as one and may have missed the MSG 8 split and the MSG 4/6 embedded boxes).
